name: Trade Flow & OBI Compound (Tightened)
hypothesis: Tightening the threshold on the successful trade_flow_obi_compound signal will isolate an even higher-conviction subset of trades. When extreme signed trade flow aligns with extreme BBO imbalance, the subsequent price move should be even more predictable, leading to an improved Win Rate and expectancy.
mutation_note: Directly implementing the 'tighten_threshold' recommendation from the feedback analyst and improvement proposal. Threshold increased from 2.5 to 3.0.
